inputs.label: Container Length (m)
inputs.businessContext: Standard container lengths per ISO 668. Typical lengths: 6m, 12m.

inputs.label: Container Width (m)
inputs.businessContext: Standard width per ISO 668. Typical width: 2.4m.

inputs.label: Container Height (m)
inputs.businessContext: Standard height per ISO 668. Typical heights: 2.6m (standard), 2.9m (high cube).

inputs.label: Wall Thickness (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Insulation and structural thickness. Common values: 50mm, 75mm, 100mm.

inputs.label: Material Type
inputs.businessContext: Structural material. Steel is most common for durability; aluminum for lightweight; composite for insulation.

inputs.label: Has Insulation
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if container includes thermal insulation. Affects usable internal dimensions.

inputs.label: Door Type
inputs.businessContext: Door configuration affects opening width and usable space.

inputs.label: Number of Windows
inputs.businessContext: Windows reduce wall area but improve natural lighting. Typical range 0-4.

inputs.label: Floor Type
inputs.businessContext: Floor material affects load capacity and durability.

rules: if (hasInsulation == false) then wallThickness >= 30 else wallThickness >= 50

thresholds.internalVolume: if internalVolume < 10 then 'Small container' else if internalVolume < 30 then 'Medium container' else 'Large container'

hiddenLossDrivers: if internalVolume < 10 then 'Volume too small for standard use'
if wallThickness > 80 then 'Excessive insulation reduces internal space'
suggestedActions: if internalVolume < 10 then 'Consider increasing container dimensions or reducing wall thickness'
if wallThickness > 80 then 'Evaluate if heavy insulation is necessary; consider alternative materials'
